examples: the child showed signs of physical abuse

meanings.definition: a rude expression intended to offend or hurt
examples: when a student made a stupid mistake he spared them no abuse
they yelled insults at the visiting team
She is always stepping on others to get ahead

meanings.definition: change the inherent purpose or function of something
examples: The director of the factory misused the funds intended for the health care of his workers

meanings.definition: use foul or abusive language towards
examples: The actress abused the policeman who gave her a parking ticket
The angry mother shouted at the teacher

meanings.definition: use wrongly or improperly or excessively
examples: while she was pregnant, she abused drugs
